stages.title: Site Analysis
stages.narration: Stage 1. Site analysis. Prefabricated structures require precise planning because components are manufactured off-site.
stages.explanation: Prefabricated structures require precise planning because components are manufactured off-site.

stages.title: Setting Out
stages.narration: Stage 2. Setting out. Grid lines and panel positions are marked for modular installation.
stages.explanation: Accurate layout ensures correct installation of factory-produced components.

stages.title: Excavation
stages.narration: Stage 3. Foundation trenches are excavated to competent bearing soil.
stages.explanation: Foundations provide support for the prefabricated structural system.

stages.title: Foundation Construction
stages.narration: Stage 4. PCC, reinforced footings, and the foundation beam are constructed.
stages.explanation: The foundation distributes structural loads safely into the soil.

stages.title: Anchor Bolt Installation
stages.narration: Stage 5. Anchor bolts are installed and aligned to connect prefabricated components to the foundation.
stages.explanation: Anchor bolts connect prefabricated components to the foundation.

stages.title: Floor Panel Installation
stages.narration: Stage 6. Factory-manufactured floor panels are lifted into position and locked to the foundation.
stages.explanation: Factory-manufactured floor panels create a precise structural platform.

stages.title: Wall Panel Installation
stages.narration: Stage 7. Factory-manufactured wall panels are now being installed. Precision manufacturing improves quality, reduces waste and accelerates construction.
stages.explanation: Wall panels are manufactured under controlled conditions for improved quality.

stages.title: Corner Connections
stages.narration: Stage 8. Steel connectors lock panels at corners and stabilize the modular frame.
stages.explanation: Panel connections are critical because they transfer structural forces.

stages.title: Window and Door Modules
stages.narration: Stage 9. Preassembled door and window modules are inserted into wall openings.

stages.title: Roof Panel Installation
stages.narration: Stage 10. Insulated roof panels are lifted and connected to complete the building envelope.
stages.explanation: Lightweight roof panels reduce structural demand.

stages.title: Insulation System
stages.narration: Stage 11. Sandwich panel insulation cores and thermal barriers improve energy performance.
stages.explanation: Insulated panels improve thermal performance and energy efficiency.

stages.title: Mechanical Connection Check
stages.narration: Stage 12. Connection inspection verifies bolts and panel locking systems.
stages.explanation: Proper connection installation is essential for structural performance.

stages.title: Services Installation
stages.narration: Stage 13. Electrical and water services are routed through preformed panel openings.

stages.title: Finishing Works
stages.narration: Stage 14. Exterior and interior finishes complete the habitable prefabricated house.
stages.explanation: Minimal finishing work is required because many components are factory finished.

stages.title: Completed Structure
stages.narration: Construction complete. Prefabricated construction reduces construction time by manufacturing components before site installation.
stages.explanation: Fully assembled modular resilient house ready for occupancy.

floor_panel.title: Precast Floor Panel
floor_panel.structuralRole: Provides rigid platform for wall and roof modules.
floor_panel.loadDistribution: Distributes gravity loads to foundation beam and footings.

wall_panel.title: Sandwich Wall Panel
wall_panel.compositeAction: Steel skins with insulation core act as composite wall.
wall_panel.thermalPerformance: Insulated core reduces heat transfer through envelope.

steel_connector.title: Steel Connector
steel_connector.forceTransfer: Transfers shear and tension between adjacent panels.

roof_panel.title: Insulated Roof Panel
roof_panel.weightReduction: Lightweight panels reduce seismic base shear.
roof_panel.thermalProtection: Insulated roof improves comfort and efficiency.

insulation_core.title: Insulation Core
insulation_core.energyEfficiency: Reduces heating and cooling energy demand.
insulation_core.heatTransferResistance: Thermal barrier limits conduction through walls.
